results.title: City Kayak™ in San Francisco - San Francisco, Kayak, Kayaking
results.content: * San Francisco Downtown or South Beach Kayak Trips- Weekends. * Full Moon Kayak Trip- 6/28 Saturday. For 6 people and more, we can host a tour any day of the week. Check out the Ownership Program, storage, or Frequent Pass options. We have many kayaks available, and you can store near water. Get a discount for a storage space and access the bay easier too. You can gift a kayak experience. City Kayak is located in South Beach district of San Francisco, next to Oracle Park 10 minute paddle to McCovey Cove. To check in, walk inside the building Pier 40 at  South Beach Harbor. **You can store a kayak and SUP board steps away from the water. Get a discount when you buy a kayak or SUP to store at this location too.**. #### San Francisco South Beach Kayak Trip. You get a rec touring kayak and a block of time. #### San Francisco Downtown Kayak Trip.

results.title: Water Activities | San Francisco Peninsula Outdoors
results.content: # Outdoor Water Activities on The San Francisco Peninsula. Whether you’re looking to kayak on the Pacific Ocean or surf in Pacifica, you can find it all here! With the Pacific Ocean on one side and San Francisco Bay on the other, The San Francisco Peninsula puts every kind of water adventure within easy reach. Paddle a kayak past seals and seabirds in Half Moon Bay, catch a wave at one of Pacifica's surf breaks, or watch gray whales pass by from the Pacifica Pier. Kayaking is one of the best ways to experience the Peninsula. This Half Moon Bay kayaking company allows you to discover the world of sea kayaking in the Pacific Ocean. If you happen to be on The San Francisco Peninsula's bayside, make sure to pack a picnic and rent an electric boat with Edgewater Marine in Foster City. Located in Pacifica, the Pacifica Pier is one of the best locations for whale watching in the San Francisco Peninsula.

results.title: Kayak and SUP trips in the San Francisco Bay | Sea Trek Kayak and SUP
results.content: # Guided Kayak and SUP Tours. ## Guided Kayak or SUP tours in the San Francisco Bay! Sea Trek offers kayaking and stand-up paddleboarding trips throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. Whether you want to take a kayak or SUPtrip that only lasts a couple of hours, a trip that lasts a full day, or the complete overnight experience, we have options that can meet your wishes. These trips are designed for people looking to expand their paddling skills and to see new areas around San Francisco Bay. We use single traditional kayaks for these trips. ### Scenic Alameda Kayak Tour. 2 Stand-Up Paddleboarders enjoying the magnificent views of San Francisco from a guided Stand Up Paddleboard tour out of Sausalito. Guided kayak tour out in Sausalito California. Watch the sun set on San Francisco Bay and enjoy paddling under the light of a full moon. A family enjoying the Take the Kids Kayak Tour with Sea Trek out of Sausalito, California. ### Paddle the Gate Kayak Tour.

results.title: Home | Bay Water Trail
results.content: Bay Water Trail logo Bay Water Trail. ### The Bay Area Water Trail. is a regional program that encourages non-motorized small boaters to safely enjoy the San Francisco Bay. Whether you prefer a kayak or SUP, kiteboard or outrigger, there are so many ways and amazing destinations **to explore…**. ## EXPLORE. ## KNOW BEFORE YOU GO. Plan your trip based on weather, tides, current, wind, and your own capability. Always wear a personal flotation device and practice rescue skills before you need them. Give wide berth to wildlife and avoid landing in sensitive habitats. ## PLAN.
